rule_hits.summary: Lists references supporting the research, including papers on game theory, LLMs, and networking applications.
This article proposes a GAI-enabled game theory solution for mobile networking, outlining game theory and GAI technologies, exploring their advantages, reviewing existing resear...
Reviews existing literature on LLMs and game theory, analyzes their contributions and limitations, and presents potential applications in networking.
Summarizes the integration of LLMs with game theory, potential applications, and the proposed framework for network optimization.
